title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Motilal Oswal

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Motilal Oswal
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Motilal Oswal in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Motilal Oswal:
Motilal Oswal is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
